caption: A woman with dark hair and glasses, wearing a light green embroidered blouse and a dark beaded necklace, speaks while gesturing with her hands against a solid black background. In the first frame, she has her mouth open and her hands positioned in front of her chest, with her fingers curled. As the sequence progresses, she continues to speak, with her facial expressions and mouth positions shifting slightly across the frames. Her hands remain active, shifting position and moving closer together as she communicates. In the bottom left frame, her hands are slightly lowered, while in the final frame, she gestures again near her chest. A small, circular red and gold logo featuring the text "NPTEL" is visible in the bottom left corner of each frame. The scene remains static in terms of location and clothing, focusing entirely on the woman's upper body and her expressive hand movements.
